title: Paramecium bursaria immunofluorescence protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6po4o","text":"This protocol has been developed for immunofluorescent localisation of host proteins in Paramecium bursaria 186b. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":88,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Take 6 mL of P. bursaria culture per treatment. Centrifuge 800 x g, °C, 10 minutes and remove 5 mL (i.e. concentrate sample 6-fold). Aliquot 1 mL of concentrated culture into a 1.5 mL micro-centrifuge tube per treatment for downstream steps.
Centrifuge 800 x g, °C, 10 minutes to pellet the cells. Remove supernatant, avoiding the cell pellet.

Re-suspend cells in 500 µL PBS containing 4% formaldehyde [ 375 µL PBS plus 125 µL 16% formaldehyde]. Use a fresh ampule of formaldehyde for each experiment. Incubate for 00:12:00 Room temperature Pierce™ 16% Formaldehyde (w/v) Methanol-free Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #28906
Centrifuge 800 x g, °C, 10 minutes , remove supernatant and wash once in 500 µL PBS. Repeat the centrifugation 800 x g, °C, 10 minutes
Re-suspend cell pellet in 500 µL PBS containing 0.05 % volume Tween 20. Incubate for 00:10:00 Room temperature Tween 20 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P1379-500ml
Centrifuge 800 x g, °C, 10 minutes , remove supernatant and wash twice in 500 µL PBS. Repeat the centrifugation 800 x g, °C, 10 minutes, x2

Prepare PBS containing 3 % volume BSA. Filter through a 0.2 micron syringe filter prior to use. Re-suspend cells in 500 µL of this solution. 01:00:00 Room temperature Bovine Serum Albumin Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A2153

Add 1 µL primary antibody directly to the cells in PBS+3% BSA. A good positive control here is 1 µL Anti-α-Tubulin antibody Anti-α-Tubulin antibody Mouse monoclonal Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #T6199-25UL Overnight 4 °C You will need to titrate an appropriate concentration of the primary antibody here
After the overnight incubation, wash three times in 500 µL PBS. Repeat the centrifugation 800 x g, °C, 10 minutes, x3 and re-suspend the cells in 500 µL PBS.

Add 1 µL secondary antibody. For rabbit primary antibodies: Goat Anti-Rabbit IgG H&L (Alexa Fluor® 488) Abcam Catalog #ab150077 For mouse primary antibodies (e.g. Anti-α-Tubulin antibody used above): Goat Anti-Mouse IgG H&L (Alexa Fluor® 488) preadsorbed Abcam Catalog #ab150117 02:00:00 Room temperature, in the dark
Centrifuge 800 x g, °C, 10 minutes , remove supernatant and wash twice in 500 µL PBS. Repeat the centrifugation 800 x g, °C, 10 minutes, x2 and re-suspend in 20 µL of residual PBS

Using a wide-bore tip (i.e. a 1 mL pipette tip with the end cut-off), spot approximately 10 µL onto Poly-Prep Slides Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P0425-72EA Add only one sample to the centre of each slide to allow for sealing
Add a drop of CITIFLUOR AF2 to the residual PBS. CITIFLUOR Antifadent Mounting Medium AF2 Electron Microscopy Sciences Catalog #17971-100
If required, add 2 µL of 10 mg/mL Hoechst 33342 Hoechst 33342 Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #H1399 00:05:00 Room temperature
Add a coverslip and seal with clear nail polish.
creator: David S Milner
